summary: Comprehensive testing of GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) integration into Pinnacle.AI's AI Testing engine completed successfully. All 17 GEO-specific backend tests pass (100%), and all 31 existing backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI correctly displays Citation Probability and GEO Score side-by-side, 3 GEO factor cards (Generative Readiness, Summarization Resilience, Brand Retention), expandable GEO Insights section with strengths/weaknesses/suggestions, and test history shows both Citation% and GEO%.
passed_tests: GEO Score calculation in /api/ai-test response (0-100 range)
Generative Readiness score returned (0-100)
Summarization Resilience score returned (0-100)
Brand Retention Probability score returned (0-100)
Detected Brand extraction from URL/title/schema
GEO Insights structure with strengths, weaknesses, improvement_suggestions
GEO Insights strengths have area, strength, detail fields
GEO Insights weaknesses have area, weakness, detail, severity fields
GEO Insights suggestions have issue, why_it_matters_for_generation, how_to_fix fields
GEO Score calculation is weighted: 40% readiness + 30% resilience + 30% brand
Wikipedia URL returns varied GEO scores (58% Citation, 67% GEO)
Citation probability still works alongside GEO
Position estimation still works (Top 3/5/10/Low likelihood)
Citation gaps (why_not_cited) still returned
Improvement suggestions still returned
Breakdown scores still returned (intent_match, extractability, authority, schema_support, content_depth)
Test history list includes geo_score field
Frontend displays Citation Probability and GEO Score side by side
Frontend shows GEO Score with 'NEW' badge
Frontend shows Detected Brand
Frontend displays 3 GEO factor cards (Generative Readiness, Summarization Resilience, Brand Retention)
GEO Insights expandable section shows Strengths
GEO Insights expandable section shows Weaknesses with severity badges
GEO Insights expandable section shows GEO Improvement Suggestions
Test history shows both Citation% and GEO% columns
context_for_next_testing_agent: GEO integration testing complete. All GEO scores are deterministic with no external AI/LLM dependencies. GEO Score formula: 40% Generative Readiness + 30% Summarization Resilience + 30% Brand Retention. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_geo_functionality.py covers all GEO endpoints. Frontend GEO display verified with Playwright screenshots.

ui_elements_verified: GEO Score card with NEW badge
Test history with Citation% and GEO% columns
